name: NativeSelect
visual_summary: NativeSelect is an HTML select element wrapper providing accessibility features. Use it when you need a native select behavior with accessibility.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready other component with the following characteristics:

Name: NativeSelect
Description: NativeSelect is an HTML select element wrapper providing accessibility features. Use it when you need a native select behavior with accessibility.
Style: native
Interactions: clickable
Tags: accessibility, select

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
// packages/@mantine/core/src/components/NativeSelect/index.ts
import type { NativeSelectFactory, NativeSelectProps } from './NativeSelect';

export { NativeSelect } from './NativeSelect';

export type { NativeSelectProps, NativeSelectFactory };
